criteria.name: Problem Definition Clarity
criteria.description: The student clearly defines the problem by identifying the specific model evaluation and overfitting issues present.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student provides a detailed explanation of the evaluation metrics and overfitting concerns, distinguishing between training and validation phases.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student provides a vague or incomplete explanation, failing to differentiate between evaluation metrics or overfitting concerns.

criteria.name: Metric Selection Justification
criteria.description: The student selects appropriate evaluation metrics relevant to the problem context.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student selects metrics that are directly applicable to the problem and justifies their choices based on the model's objectives and data characteristics.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student selects metrics arbitrarily without justification or relevance to the model's objectives.

criteria.name: Overfitting Identification
criteria.description: The student identifies signs of overfitting in the model's performance.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student correctly identifies overfitting by comparing training and validation performance and explains how it impacts the model's generalizability.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student fails to identify overfitting or incorrectly attributes it to unrelated factors.

typical_errors: Using inappropriate metrics for the model type
Ignoring differences between training and validation performance

criteria.name: Error Detection in AI Output
criteria.description: The student accurately identifies errors or gaps in the AI's evaluation of the model.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student identifies specific instances where the AI's evaluation metrics are incorrect or misinterpreted, providing clear examples.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student overlooks significant errors or fails to recognize misinterpretations in the AI's output.

criteria.name: Overfitting Analysis
criteria.description: The student assesses whether the AI correctly identifies overfitting issues.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student accurately judges whether the AI's analysis of overfitting is valid, providing evidence from the data.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student accepts invalid AI analysis without questioning or evidence.

criteria.name: Metric Evaluation
criteria.description: The student evaluates the appropriateness of the AI-selected metrics.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student correctly assesses the suitability of the metrics used by the AI for the given model and context.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student fails to recognize when inappropriate metrics are used by the AI.

typical_errors: Failing to identify incorrect metric interpretation

criteria.name: Correction Commands Precision
criteria.description: The student provides precise correction commands to address identified errors in AI output.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student gives clear, specific commands that directly address and correct the identified issues in the AI's evaluation.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student provides vague or incorrect commands that do not resolve the identified errors.

criteria.name: Guidance on Overfitting Mitigation
criteria.description: The student suggests strategies to the AI for mitigating overfitting.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student recommends effective techniques such as regularization, cross-validation, or data augmentation to reduce overfitting.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student suggests irrelevant or ineffective techniques that do not address overfitting.

criteria.name: Metric Adjustment Suggestions
criteria.description: The student provides suggestions for adjusting evaluation metrics to better fit the model context.
criteria.excellent_indicator: The student suggests appropriate alternative metrics or adjustments that enhance the model's evaluation.
criteria.poor_indicator: The student suggests inappropriate or irrelevant metrics without improving the model's evaluation.

typical_errors: Failing to propose meaningful metric adjustments
